defaults.project_name: Mack Magnets — E-Commerce Upgrade & Admin System
defaults.project_description: Full e-commerce implementation and custom Admin Command Center to eliminate platform fees.
defaults.payment_terms: Non-refundable deposit of $1,000.00 due to initiate. Balance of $4,000.00 paid in 8 monthly installments of $500.00.

clauses.title: Payment Terms & Security
clauses.body:
• Deposit: $1,000.00 non-refundable deposit due 03/13/2026 to secure project slot.
• Installments: 8 payments of $500.00 due on the 13th of each month (Starting 04/13/2026).
• Service Suspension: If any installment is more than 15 days late, Provider reserves the right to suspend website access, API integrations, and the Admin Dashboard until the account is brought current.
• Early Buyout: Client may settle the remaining balance at any time. A 5% discount applies if paid in full before 06/13/2026.

clauses.title: IP Ownership & Licensing
clauses.body:
• Client Assets: Upon final payment, Client owns all custom branding, product data, and customer records.
• Provider Intellectual Property: Provider (AjayaDesign) retains all rights to the underlying source code, database architecture, and Admin Dashboard framework. Client is granted a perpetual, non-transferable license to use this code for Mack Magnets only.
• Usage Restriction: Client may not resell, sub-license, or distribute the Provider's proprietary code or dashboard logic to third parties.

clauses.title: Third-Party Service Liability
clauses.body:
Provider utilizes free-tier services (Firebase, GitHub, Google Drive) to minimize Client costs. Provider is not responsible for: 
1. Service outages by third-party providers (Stripe, Google, GitHub).
2. Changes in third-party pricing or free-tier eligibility.
3. Data loss resulting from Client's mismanagement of API keys or login credentials.

clauses.title: Termination & Kill Fee
clauses.body:
• Termination by Client: If Client terminates for convenience, the $1,000 deposit is forfeited. Additionally, Client shall pay for all work hours completed beyond the deposit value at a rate of $125/hour.
• Work Product: Upon termination and full payment of outstanding 'work-to-date' fees, Provider will hand over the current state of the code. No further support will be provided.

clauses.title: 30-Day Launch Warranty
clauses.body: Provider offers a 30-day bug-fix warranty starting from the Go-Live date (03/22/2026). This covers functional defects in the custom code. It does not cover new feature requests, changes to third-party APIs, or issues caused by Client-side modifications to the source code.
